summary.market: Market Update (Mar 29): US markets closed lower Friday, hit by geopolitical tension from the Iran conflict and rising oil prices. Amazon (AMZN) holdings remain stable; AWS AI demand is a key driver. Intel (INTC) declined 2.2% amid volatility over "Arrow Lake Refresh" changes; focus remains on AI PC partnerships.
